name: Rome Charters LLC
districts_or_customers: Formerly DC Public Schools (2016-2022; ~$831K paid via COVID relief funds); suspended by DC Government in Nov 2022
recent_news: 2022: Suspended by DC government in November 2022 following October 27, 2022 incident where Fairfax County Police arrested a Rome Charters driver after a bus carrying DC kindergarteners hit a curb and blew out a tire; cited for 18 safety violations including driver licensing and bus condition. DCPS terminated relationship.
fit_notes: NOT a fit. Charter bus operator (not yellow school bus contractor) with serious 2022 safety/regulatory record; suspended from DC operations. Reputational and operational risk make this a clear pass for Summit tuck-in.

name: Wcsmith Shipley Bus Ctr
recent_news: No company-specific news found. Address 3428 25th St SE sits in DC's Shipley Terrace neighborhood (a WC Smith-managed residential area), suggesting the listing may be mis-tagged or a very small/inactive operator.
fit_notes: Low confidence this is an actual operating school-bus contractor. No website, no FMCSA record under this exact name, no district contracts identifiable. Likely too small/uncertain to be a Summit tuck-in target; would need on-the-ground verification.

name: Getto Transportation Ctr
owner_or_parent: Washoe County School District (public school district)
recent_news: 2024-2026: WCSD undertaking ~$33M modernization of the Getto (George Getto) Central Transportation Yard at 1850 Kleppe Ln, Sparks; groundbreaking held; new admin/office area, 8-bay bus shop, 3-bay fleet shop, driver break/training rooms.
fit_notes: NOT a fit / NOT a target. This is the Washoe County School District's own central bus yard (public-owned, in-house operation), not a private contractor. Should be excluded from the prospect universe.

name: Koerner Bus Svc
districts_or_customers: Walworth, WI area school districts (specific contracts not publicly disclosed)
recent_news: No recent M&A or growth news. FMCSA records show ~10 power units and ~8 drivers; entered MCMIS May 31, 1991. Company operates under WI FMCSA oversight; contact koernerbus@msn.com.
fit_notes: Sub-scale single-yard family operator (~10 buses) in southeastern WI. Long-tenured (since 1991) family-led business, no website/email suggests aging principal - potential succession candidate but very small. Only relevant as a micro tuck-in to an existing WI platform location; standalone too small for Summit.

name: Northern Express Bus Service
districts_or_customers: Berlin Area School District; Ripon Area School District (won contract in 2022, first new contractor in over a decade); Boys & Girls Club of Tri-County Area (Clay Lamberton afterschool route); ~5-6 districts total
recent_news: 2022: Won Ripon Area School District contract (May 2022 board approval), displacing prior longtime provider; owner Jeff Walker pursuing acquisition of 525 E Fond du Lac St as Ripon terminal. Owner described as 'heavily involved in daily operations' with 'outstanding reputation.' 2020: $95K PPP loan received.
fit_notes: Independent owner-operator (Jeff Walker), reputation-driven, actively growing (new Ripon contract + terminal purchase). DOT #3157839, USDOT-registered LLC. Genuine small private operator with multi-district base in central WI - reasonable micro tuck-in candidate to a WI platform yard; standalone size likely below Summit threshold but worth tracking.
